name: IndoStar Capital Finance Limited
summary: IndoStar Capital Finance Limited, a non-banking financial company, provides various financing services to corporates, and small and medium enterprises in India. It offers secured corporate lending products, including senior secured debt, structured financing, promoter funding, mezzanine funding, structured and acquisition financing, and real estate developer financing products; as well as loans for construction of commercial and residential properties. The company also provides SME lending products including self-occupied residential and commercial property, working capital, and business expansion or other requirements; vehicle finance; and housing finance. In addition, it offers investment advisory and asset management services. The company was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Mumbai, India. IndoStar Capital Finance Limited is a subsidiary of IndoStar Capital (Mauritius).
